_comment: Approximate outline of Manoel Island (Malta). Slightly generous so the LiDAR ground returns inside the polygon are kept while Sliema (south) and Gżira (north) bleed-in is excluded. The build-base-mesh.mjs --outline flag treats anything outside the polygon as sea, which suppresses the banded 'tile' artefact caused by nearest-neighbour fill-in across the harbour cells.
